_note: Curated rules always merged with live-extracted pylint-odoo/ESLint rules (per parser_lint_rules.py). Add entries here to ensure rule availability even without odoo_source_root.

rules.message: String formatting used in UserError/ValidationError — use lazy %s args or named placeholders instead of %-interpolation.
rules.fix_template:
raise UserError(_('Hello %s') % name)  # wrong
raise UserError(_('Hello %(name)s') % {'name': name})  # acceptable
raise UserError(_('Hello %s', name))  # preferred (Odoo 16+)
